{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Adaptive growth
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] possesses a power called adaptive growth, similar to [[Horizon]]'s capabilities.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Adaptive growth. It’s similar to what Horizon can do.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
